sentences.arabic: الْعَمَلُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا فِي الْمَكْتَبِ الْحَدِيثِ.
sentences.translation: Timski rad je veoma važan u savremenoj kancelariji.
sentences.translationEn: Teamwork is very important in the modern office.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نُسَاعِدُ بَعْضَنَا الْبَعْضَ لِإِكْمَالِ الْمَشَارِيعِ فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُحَدَّدِ.
sentences.translation: Pomažemo jedni drugima kako bismo završili projekte na vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: We help each other to complete projects on time.

sentences.arabic: لِكُلِّ فَرْدٍ فِي الْفَرِيقِ دَوْرٌ مُعَيَّنٌ وَمَهَامُّ وَاضِحَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Svaki član tima ima određenu ulogu i jasne zadatke.
sentences.translationEn: Every member of the team has a specific role and clear tasks.
